  • 程序包

SEARCH

所有类和接口

类
类
说明
AdminManageWorkloadFrame
Frame for administrators to manage TA workload.
AdminViewAllJobsFrame
Frame for administrators to view all job positions with status filtering.
AdminViewAllTAsFrame
Frame for administrators to view all Teaching Assistants with filtering capabilities.
AdminViewLogsFrame
Frame for administrators to view system logs.
AdminViewWorkloadFrame
Frame for Admin to view TA workload summary.
Application
Represents a TA's application to a job position.
DashboardFrame
The main dashboard frame for the TA Recruitment System.
FileUtil
Utility class for file-based data persistence operations.
Job
Represents a TA job position in the TA Management System.
LoggerUtil
Utility class for system-wide logging operations.
LoginFrame
The login frame for the TA Recruitment System.
MOEditJobFrame
Frame for Module Organizers to edit an existing job position.
MOMyJobsFrame
Frame for Module Organizers to view and manage their posted job positions.
MOPostJobFrame
Frame for Module Organizers to post new TA job positions.
MOViewApplicantsFrame
Frame for Module Organizers to view and manage applicants for their job positions.
Notification
Represents a notification message in the TA Management System.
NotificationFrame
The notification center frame for viewing and managing notifications.
Profile
Represents a Teaching Assistant's profile information.
RegisterFrame
The registration frame for new users.
TAApplicationStatusFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to view the status of their job applications.
TACVUploadFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to upload their CV.
TAJobListFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to browse available job positions.
TAProfileCreateFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to create their profile for the first time.
TAProfileEditFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to edit their profile information.
TAProfileViewFrame
Frame for Teaching Assistants to view their profile information.
UIHelper
Utility class providing consistent modern UI styling for Swing components.
User
Represents a user in the TA Management System.
WrapLayout
A flow layout that wraps components to the next line when they exceed the container width.
